_comment_purpose: Slither config — see https://github.com/crytic/slither/wiki/Usage. The `detectors_to_exclude` list silences classes of finding that are known not to apply to this codebase (e.g. assembly use inside well-audited OZ libraries, ERC-3643 / T-REX naming conventions). Anything not listed here remains in scope. Tighten over time — never widen — and justify additions in the PR description.
